question: 05 Listen again, and match sentence beginnings 1-5 with endings A-E. (10 marks)
text_with_gaps: In his youth, Kenny visited the cinema often [_1_]
Kenny realized he could meet more people online [_2_]
Kenny would rather watch films than TV series [_3_]
Kenny can make sure his videos don't get boring [_4_]
Being attractive or having expensive equipment isn't so important [_5_]

match_options.A: if he uploaded his video blog on the internet.
match_options.B: if you have things to share that you feel strongly about.
match_options.C: if he adjusts how much light he uses.
match_options.D: because they didn't own a television.
match_options.E: because he thinks TV series take up too much time.
